name: JPGLabs [GitOps] - GitLab Merge Sync to GitHub
description: When a MR is merged into develop/staging/main on GitLab, syncs ONLY that branch to GitHub via git-bridge on VPS. Validates webhook token, filters protected branches, executes git fetch+push, notifies Slack.

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ text: '[GitOps] Sync OK: ' + $json.project_name + '/' + $json.sync_branch + ' (' + $json.merge_commit_sha.substring(0, 8) + ')
MR: ' + $json.mr_title + ' (!' + $json.mr_iid + ')
Author: ' + $json.author + '
GitLab -> GitHub sync completed.' }) }}
